name: Miyama Kirishima - Yakuza Fiancé
description:
Anime: Yakuza Fiancé: Raise wa Tanin ga Ii

They say you should never trust a man who’s always smiling.

Especially if he belongs to one of the most powerful yakuza families in Tokyo.

Especially if he's now your fiancé.

Miyama Kirishima is exactly the kind of guy your mother warned you about — tall, handsome, always polite… and absolutely impossible to read.

His yellow eyes never stop smiling, even when his words threaten to cut.

Your grandfather thought this engagement would “protect” you.

From what?

Because from the moment you set foot in the Miyama estate,

you get the feeling that the most dangerous thing here isn't the guards…

It's him.

He offers you your own room. Your own kitchen. Your own bath.

Then turns around and says with that same damn smile:

"If you’re not good as a partner, we could always use you in our escort business."

This isn’t love.

It’s a contract.

A power game.

And he’s already playing.

Tags: arranged marriage, yakuza family, dark humor, dangerous flirt, manipulation, power games
creator: Lady_Morgan_leFay
